subjects.appearance_details: dense lavender stems topped with vibrant purple flower spikes, arranged in long parallel rows across sunlit soil
subjects.relationship: main landscape subject forming a sea of fragrant purple waves
subjects.location: sprawling lavender field stretching toward distant mountains
subjects.relative_size: small individual plants but vast as a collective field
subjects.orientation: rows receding diagonally toward the horizon
subjects.pose: rooted in neat rows with flower spikes lifted upward
subjects.action: sway gracefully in a gentle breeze, creating rolling wave motion across the field
subjects.state_changes: successive rows ripple, purple blooms shift from shadow to golden highlights, and the horizon becomes more defined
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: soft purple blossoms, slender green stems, dry sun-warmed leaves

background_setting: A sun-drenched lavender field extending to the horizon, bordered by a distant mountain range under late afternoon golden light.

lighting.conditions: warm late afternoon sun with long soft shadows, golden highlights on purple blossoms, gentle haze near the mountains

lighting.illumination_effect: warm late afternoon sun with long soft shadows, golden highlights on purple blossoms, gentle haze near the mountains

aesthetics.composition: tranquil pastoral beauty, rhythmic purple rows, fragrant summer atmosphere, soft mountain distance

aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: tranquil pastoral beauty, rhythmic purple rows, fragrant summer atmosphere, soft mountain distance

style_medium: realistic cinematic landscape text-to-video with natural breeze motion and rich floral color

context: The video captures an expansive lavender field moving like purple waves beneath warm late afternoon light.

actions.description: The shot opens between long lavender rows glowing purple under late afternoon sun.
A gentle breeze rolls through the plants, making the field undulate in soft waves.
The camera lifts slightly to reveal the field stretching toward a softly lit mountain range.

segments.description: Lavender rows fill the frame with dense purple blossoms and warm sunlit soil.
segments.key_changes: Foreground blossoms enter focus and the repeating rows establish depth.
segments.camera: low tracking shot aligned with the rows

segments.description: The breeze passes across the field, creating a visible wave through the lavender.
segments.key_changes: Purple flower spikes sway in sequence from foreground to middle distance.
segments.camera: smooth lateral glide with shallow foreground parallax

segments.description: The view opens toward the mountains, keeping the lavender sea in the foreground.
segments.key_changes: The mountain range and golden horizon become clearer as the plants continue moving.
segments.camera: gentle crane up into a wide pastoral view

temporal_caption: Rows of purple lavender sway in a sunlit field, forming soft waves that lead the eye toward distant golden mountains.
audio_description: light wind through lavender, faint insects, distant birds, calm open-field ambience
